global.description: The ad features a vibrant purple gradient background with a prominent headline and a clear call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting weekend escapes with flexible booking options.

elements.label: Purple gradient background
elements.description: A smooth purple gradient fills the background, creating a vibrant and inviting atmosphere.

elements.label: Escape this weekend
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Escape this weekend' is prominently displayed in the center, conveying a sense of urgency.

elements.label: Flexible booking options
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline reads 'Flexible booking options', providing additional information.

elements.label: Learn more button
elements.description: A rounded white button with the text 'Learn more' invites interaction, positioned centrally at the bottom.

elements.label: Decorative shape
elements.description: An abstract shape consisting of an oval and a rectangle in a lighter shade of purple, adding visual interest.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape in the background, complementing the main design without drawing focus.

elements.label: Additional decorative shape
elements.description: Another abstract shape in a lighter hue, enhancing the overall aesthetic of the ad.

elements.label: Secondary decorative element
elements.description: A smaller decorative shape that adds depth to the background design.

elements.label: Bottom text area
elements.description: A text area at the bottom of the ad that includes the main message and CTA.
elements.text_content: Escape this weekend Flexinla ons Learn more

elements.label: RouteBloom logo
elements.description: A small logo at the top left corner, featuring the text 'RouteBloom' in a simple, modern font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, native, vibrant and modern, Escape this weekend, Learn more
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is centered, the body text is below it, and the CTA button is at the bottom center.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Escape this weekend, Flexible booking options, Learn more, RouteBloom
